name: package_xo
short_description: Used to package a Xilinx Object (XO) container
full_help:
package_xo

Description: 
Used to package a Xilinx Object (XO) container

Syntax: 
package_xo  [-kernel_name <arg>] [-force] [-kernel_xml <arg>]
            [-output_kernel_xml <arg>] [-design_xml <arg>]
            [-ip_directory <arg>] [-parent_ip_directory <arg>]
            [-kernel_files <args>] [-kernel_xml_args <args>]
            [-kernel_xml_pipes <args>] [-kernel_xml_connections <args>]
            [-ctrl_protocol <arg>] -xo_path <arg> [-quiet] [-verbose]

Returns: 
The path to the packaged XO container

Usage: 
  Name                       Description
  --------------------------------------
  [-kernel_name]             The name of the kernel
  [-force]                   Overwrite existing kernel in XO file
  [-kernel_xml]              The path to the existing kernel XML file
  [-output_kernel_xml]       The path of the generated output kernel XML file
  [-design_xml]              The path to the existing design XML file
  [-ip_directory]            The path to the kernel IP directory
  [-parent_ip_directory]     If the kernel IP directory specified contains 
                             multiple IPs, specify a directory path to the 
                             parent IP where its component.xml is located 
                             directly below.
  [-kernel_files]            Kernel file name(s)
  [-kernel_xml_args]         Generate kernel.xml with the arg(s). Each arg 
                             value should follow this format: 
                             {name:addressQualifier:id:port:size:offset:type:
                             memSize} where memSize is optional.
  [-kernel_xml_pipes]        Generate kernel.xml with the pipe(s). Each pipe 
                             value should follow this format: 
                             {name:width:depth}
  [-kernel_xml_connections]  Generate kernel.xml with the connection(s). Each
                             connection value should follow this format: 
                             {srcInst:srcPort:dstInst:dstPort}
  [-ctrl_protocol]           Kernel control protocol. Valid values: 
                             ap_ctrl_hs, ap_ctrl_chain, ap_ctrl_none, 
                             user_managed. Default: ap_ctrl_hs
                             Default: ap_ctrl_hs
  -xo_path                   The path of the output XO container file
  [-quiet]                   Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]                 Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
Vitis, Acceleration, FileIO
